title: primula hirsuta subf. nivea
intro: Primula hirsuta subf. nivea, a lesser-known variety of the Primula hirsuta plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It is also known as the hairy primrose or mountain primrose, and is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, coughs, and sore throats.
